name: compound-selfcheck
description: PostToolUse soft-prompt: when a Write/Edit/MultiEdit/NotebookEdit produces > 100 LOC or > 5KB, emits a stderr reminder to ingest the change into a knowledge base (Compound Engineering, not one-shot). Audit-logs [COMPOUND-CHECK] entries to .harness/hook-trace.log for real-trigger vs performance distinction. Soft-prompt only — never blocks.
